betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6DFC§f (Digamma Field Containment) is an end-game power generation and containment system harnessing §bDigamma particles§f.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Contains and harnesses Digamma particle energy
• High-tier power generation
• Required for ultimate end-game recipes

§eSetup Requirements:§f
• Requires §bDNT§f components for construction
• Needs §bDigamma particles§f as fuel
• Massive power infrastructure for operation

§c§4EXTREME DANGER:§f
• Digamma particles are the most dangerous material in the mod
• Handling requires maximum protection
• Containment failure has catastrophic consequences

§eUses:§f
• Ultimate power generation
• End-game material processing
• DNT Nanosuit crafting chain

§aTip:§f This represents the absolute end-game. Only attempt once you have mastered all other nuclear technologies.
